ab: Ni ka mptusa da.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: Iya ppulah da, nhari tlung wakac.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: Ini ta balay klayi ha, sqcuqi ku miyah da!
en: Sorry, I'm late!

ab: nhari miyah ruma.
en: Come in quickly.

ab: Tupiya iyax diyax ka saya?
en: What day is it today?

ab: Nan yobi ka saya?
en: What day is it today?

ab: Turima iyax diyax ka saya, msangay ka kusun, psupu ta musa ppulah pa!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It's Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let's go out and play together!

ab: Kingyobi ka saya, msangay ka kusun, psupu ta musa ppulah pa!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It's Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let's go out and play together!

ab: Malu wah! Nta siyaw yayung.
en: Great! Let's go to the riverside.

ab: Piya iyax diyax ka kusun?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Nan yobi ka kusun?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Tuturu iyax diyax ka kusun, nta ppulah boru ka babaw cka hidaw kusun pa!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let's go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: Mphuya su ka mrbu kusun?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: Diyax sngayan ka kusun, tuhuy ku bubu mu musa pnrhulan ka yaku.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: Wa su hmuya da?
en: What's wrong?

ab: Knpbrih ku, musa ku nganguc han.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: Mtnuwing bay ka tunux mu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: Pquri ruma ka dqras mi hiyi su msangay.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: Mptusa, mnarux nbuyas mu, musa ku san nganguc.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: Iyaq, nhari musa.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: Malu ku musa trima bawa hu?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: Uxay biyaw msangay snlhayan da, usa kiya hari da.
en: It's almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Mptusa, mnarux bay ka tunux mu, mpsangay ku ka babaw cka hidaw han.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: Teacher, I have a severe headache. I need to take a sick leave in the afternoon.

ab: Iyaq, qlahang mmosa su sapah.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Mptusa, mpsangay ku ka tukingal iyax diyax, mmosa ku pqita ising.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: Iyaq, ndwani qmlahang ka hiyi su.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: Wa inu ka Ayuc?
en: Where is Ayuc?

ab: Mnarux ka nbuyas na, wa mniq san nganguc ka hiya.
en: She has a stomachache. She's in the restroom.

ab: Weynu ka Pawan?
en: Where is Pawan?

ab: Mptusa, mnarux welu na ka Pawan, msangay mi uxay miyah ka diyax saya.
en: Teacher, Pawan has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: Ma uka miyah ka Sawa?
en: Why didn't Sawa come?

ab: Wisu neycu ka hiya da.
en: She has a fever.
